commits.subject: Day 130 (04:11): Add recovery hint for "argument list too long" and "broken pipe" bash failures (Task 1)
Day 130 (02:45): Make healthy-codebase fallback produce a src/-touching task instead of journal-only (Task 2)

eval.reason: `_healthy_codebase_fallback()` now returns a src/-touching task targeting `src/state.rs` (not journals/), with `cargo test state` verifier, avoids self-reference (no `scripts/preseed_session_plan.py` in Files), and both `python3 scripts/preseed_session_plan.py --test` and `python3 -m unittest scripts.test_task_manifest` pass (22/22 OK).
